blocks.text: The building is resurfacing our garage next week, so the usual spots are closed for a few days. Management has opened the north surface lot for tenants, and your existing badge will work at the gate, no new pass needed.

If a guest needs to park while the work is on, Nancy Suarez has visitor passes at the front desk. Julie Hill asked me to make sure this reached everyone before the weekend, so please forward it to anyone I have missed. Allow a couple of extra minutes that week; the open entrance is the far one off the side street, not the main ramp.
